<!-- Generated by scripts/zo_build_card_grid.py from _data/cards.yml. Do not edit directly. -->

::: {.zo-card-grid}
::: {.zo-card .is-published}
<a class="zo-card-figure" href="dan_nhap.qmd"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/dan_nhap.svg" alt="Dẫn nhập"/></a>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
Dẫn nhập
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">BẮT ĐẦU</span>
<a class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action" href="dan_nhap.qmd">Vào bài</a>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-published}
<a class="zo-card-figure" href="core/ham_so_hang.qmd"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_001.svg" alt="$y=1$"/></a>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=1$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#001C</span>
<a class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action" href="core/ham_so_hang.qmd">Vào bài</a>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-published}
<a class="zo-card-figure" href="core/ham_so_bac_nhat.qmd"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_004.svg" alt="$y=x$"/></a>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#004C</span>
<a class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action" href="core/ham_so_bac_nhat.qmd">Vào bài</a>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_012.svg" alt="$y=x^2$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^2$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#012C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_024.svg" alt="$y=x^3$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^3$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#024C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_034.svg" alt="$y=x^4$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^4$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#034C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_044.svg" alt="$y=x^5$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^5$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#044C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_076.svg" alt="$y=x^n$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^n$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#076C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_077.svg" alt="$y=\sqrt{x}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sqrt{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#077C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_079.svg" alt="$y=\sqrt[3]{x}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sqrt[3]{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#079B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_080.svg" alt="$y=x^{2/3}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^{2/3}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#080D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_050.svg" alt="$y=\frac{1}{x}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#050C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_081.svg" alt="$y=\frac{1}{x^2}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#081B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_082.svg" alt="$y=\frac{1}{x^3}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{x^3}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#082B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_083.svg" alt="$y=x^\alpha$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x^\alpha$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#083D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_053.svg" alt="$y=\frac{x-1}{x+1}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x-1}{x+1}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#053B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_057.svg" alt="$y=\frac{x^2-1}{x}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x^2-1}{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#057C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-published}
<a class="zo-card-figure" href="core/ham_so_gia_tri_tuyet_doi.qmd"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_085.svg" alt="$y=\lvert x\rvert$"/></a>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\lvert x\rvert$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#085C</span>
<a class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action" href="core/ham_so_gia_tri_tuyet_doi.qmd">Vào bài</a>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_087.svg" alt="$y=\operatorname{sgn}x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\operatorname{sgn}x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#087B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_089.svg" alt="$y=\lfloor x\rfloor$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\lfloor x\rfloor$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#089D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_091.svg" alt="$y=\{x\}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\{x\}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#091D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_092.svg" alt="$y=\max(0,x)$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\max(0,x)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#092D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_094.svg" alt="$y=\begin{cases}1-\lvert x\rvert,&amp;\lvert x\rvert\le1\\0,&amp;\text{khác}\end{cases}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\begin{cases}1-\lvert x\rvert,&\lvert x\rvert\le1\\0,&\text{khác}\end{cases}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#094B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_095.svg" alt="$y=\sin x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sin x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#095C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_097.svg" alt="$y=\tan x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\tan x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#097C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_104.svg" alt="$y=\sec x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sec x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#104B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_106.svg" alt="$y=\arcsin x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\arcsin x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#106B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_108.svg" alt="$y=\arctan x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\arctan x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#108B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_111.svg" alt="$y=e^x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=e^x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#111C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_114.svg" alt="$y=\ln x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\ln x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#114C</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_120.svg" alt="$y=xe^x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=xe^x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#120D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_121.svg" alt="$y=x\ln x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x\ln x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#121D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_122.svg" alt="$y=\sinh x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sinh x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#122D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_123.svg" alt="$y=\cosh x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\cosh x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#123D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_124.svg" alt="$y=\tanh x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\tanh x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#124D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_129.svg" alt="$y=x\sin x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x\sin x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#129BD</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_130.svg" alt="$y=\frac{\sin x}{x}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{\sin x}{x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#130D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_131.svg" alt="$y=\sin\left(\frac{1}{x}\right)$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sin\left(\frac{1}{x}\right)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#131D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_132.svg" alt="$y=x+\sin x$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=x+\sin x$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#132B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_133.svg" alt="$y=\ln(\sin x),\ x\in(0,\pi)$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\ln(\sin x),\ x\in(0,\pi)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#133D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_134.svg" alt="$y=\sqrt{1-x^2}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\sqrt{1-x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#134B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_136.svg" alt="$y=\frac{x}{1+x^2}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x}{1+x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#136B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_138.svg" alt="$y=e^{-\frac{1}{2}x^2}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=e^{-\frac{1}{2}x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#138D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_139.svg" alt="$y=e^{-\lvert x\rvert}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=e^{-\lvert x\rvert}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#139D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_140.svg" alt="$y=\frac{1}{1+x^2}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{1+x^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#140D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_142.svg" alt="$y=\frac{1}{x}e^{-\frac{1}{2}(\ln x)^2}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{x}e^{-\frac{1}{2}(\ln x)^2}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#142D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_143.svg" alt="$y=\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#143BD</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_145.svg" alt="$y=e^{-e^{-x}}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=e^{-e^{-x}}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#145D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_149.svg" alt="$y=\frac{x}{1+x}$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\frac{x}{1+x}$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#149B</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_151.svg" alt="$y=\ln(1+e^x)$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\ln(1+e^x)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#151D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_155.svg" alt="$y=\Gamma(x)$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=\Gamma(x)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#155D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.zo-card .is-pending}
<div class="zo-card-figure"><img class="zo-card-image" src="assets/img/cards/the_157.svg" alt="$y=J_0(x)$"/></div>

::: {.zo-card-body}
::: {.zo-card-title}
$y=J_0(x)$
:::

::: {.zo-card-actions}
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--meta">#157D</span>
<span class="zo-card-pill zo-card-pill--action is-disabled">Đang chờ</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::
